title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
description: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
description: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
description: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
description: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

title: The OpenAI trial wraps up, and the Musk founder machine keeps spinning
description: The Musk v. Altman trial came to a close this week, and the final arguments kept circling back to one question: can we trust the people in charge of AI? All of this is playing out as SpaceX charges toward what could be one of the largest IPOs in American history, with a whole generation of founders already spinning out […]

title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
description: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite vacation spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
description: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

title: Runway started by helping filmmakers — now it wants to beat Google at AI
description: AI video-generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.

title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
description: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.

description: Here's what the biggest tech court case of the year is all about.

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceXAI has been bleeding staff since its merger
description: More than 50 employees have reportedly left Elon Musk’s newly merged SpaceXAI since February, raising questions about burnout, leadership changes, talent poaching, and whether liquidity events weakened retention incentives.

title: OpenAI says Codex is coming to your phone
description: The update gives users enhanced flexibility over how they can manage their workflows.

title: What happens when AI starts building itself?
description: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.

title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
description: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.

title: Clawdmeter turns your Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard
description: A new open source gadget called Clawdmeter turns Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard for AI coding power users.

title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
description: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.

title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
description: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.
